{{CargoRelic
|name=First Abstract Work
|class_id=21271
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Wassily Kandinsky is widely regarded as one of the pioneers of abstract art. This watercolor is often considered the first purely abstract painting in modern art history. This piece marked a radical departure from traditional representation.
|fame=35
|art=73
|fth=47
|civ=49
|tech=39
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
